name: ALERUS FINANCIAL CORP
summary: Company Overview and History Alerus Financial Corporation(theCompany)is a diversified financial services company headquartered in Grand Forks, North Dakota. Through the Companys subsidiary, Alerus Financial, National Association(the Bank), the Company provides innovative and comprehensive financial solutions to businesses and consumers through three distinct business segmentsbanking, retirement and benefit services, andwealth.
